name: §2.16 MADR ADR schema: ADR template/skill references the MADR status enum (proposed|accepted|rejected|superseded|deprecated)
command: grep -rqE "proposed|accepted|rejected|superseded|deprecated" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/architect.md" 2>/dev/null && echo madr_enum 1>&2 || grep -rqE "proposed|accepted|rejected|superseded|deprecated" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills" 2>/dev/null && echo madr_enum 1>&2
